scope: Direct follow-on analysis of frozen_active_carry_dataset_046.json from the 046 bundle.
main_result: The exact future-transition signature can be sharpened. Let tau be the initial flat-run length (the number of consecutive future grouped-delta steps equal to (0,0,0,1)), and let epsilon be the current grouped-delta event class with values {flat, wrap, carry_jump, other}, where carry_jump=(1,1,0,0), wrap=(0,0,0,0), flat=(0,0,0,1), and other collects the remaining current grouped-delta values seen on the checked active branch. Then on m=5,7,9,11 the carry bit c=1_{q=m-1} is an exact function of current B=(s,u,v,layer,family) together with (tau, epsilon). Moreover, the ambiguity of B+tau alone is confined entirely to tau=0; for tau>0, B+tau already determines c exactly.

definitions.tau: initial flat-run length for future grouped delta dn=(0,0,0,1)

epsilon_classes.other: all other current dn values seen on the checked active branch

meaning.local_branch: The next live local branch can be phrased more narrowly than in 046. It is not merely admissible coding of an exact future window; it is admissible coding of tau together with the 4-valued current grouped-delta event class epsilon.
meaning.structural_branch: The carry sheet c is already the first exact future nonflat-event datum on the grouped base. The only unresolved piece is admissible access to that anticipation datum.
